task: Write a Python function that validates an AWS S3 bucket name according to AWS naming rules (3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number)
Write a regular expression to match valid AWS IAM role ARNs in the format arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/role-name
Write a Python function that extracts the region and service name from an AWS ARN string
Write a JSON object representing an AWS Lambda function configuration with environment variables, timeout, memory, and runtime
Write a regular expression to validate AWS access key IDs (20 uppercase alphanumeric characters starting with AKIA)
Write a Python function that converts an AWS CloudWatch log timestamp to a human-readable format
Write a JSON object representing an AWS EC2 security group ingress rule allowing HTTPS traffic from a specific CIDR block
Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 URI (s3://bucket-name/key-path) and returns bucket name and key separately
Write a regular expression to match AWS DynamoDB table names (valid characters: a-z, A-Z, 0-9, dashes, underscores, up to 255 characters)
Write a Python function that calculates AWS pricing based on EC2 instance type and hourly usage
Write a JSON object representing an AWS RDS database instance configuration with engine, storage, and backup settings
Write a Python function that validates AWS VPC CIDR blocks to ensure they fall within private IP ranges
Write a regular expression to extract AWS account IDs from CloudTrail log event names
Write a Python function that generates an AWS S3 object key path from a timestamp and file type
Write a JSON object representing an AWS SQS queue configuration with message retention and visibility timeout
Write a Python function that filters AWS CloudWatch metrics by namespace and metric name
Write a regular expression to match AWS Secrets Manager secret names (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores, forward slashes)
Write a Python function that converts AWS resource tags dictionary to a list of tag objects for API calls
Write a JSON object representing an AWS CloudFormation template parameter with type, default value, and constraints
Write a Python function that parses AWS error messages and extracts the error code and description
